title: Pseudobrassaiopsis hainla
taxonomy: Pseudobrassaiopsis hainla is classified within the family Adelantaceae. This plant belongs to the family of flowering plants, and its classification is further refined to the order of Celastrales. The family Adelantaceae is a small, yet distinct group of plants that are closely related to other families within the same order. Pseudobrassaiopsis hainla is native to the Himalayan region and is often found growing in areas with high altitudes and cool temperatures. Its classification is an important aspect of understanding its evolution and ecological role in its native habitat.
